message:
Add browser scheduler benchmark suite and determinism regression tests (umelq.5.5)

- benches/scheduler_browser_bench.rs: 5 Criterion benchmark groups covering
  browser ready-handoff overhead, profile throughput, cancel preemption,
  fairness metrics collection, and PriorityScheduler browser workloads
- tests/scheduler_browser_determinism.rs: 10 regression tests validating
  handoff limit enforcement, cancel priority preservation, deterministic
  dispatch ordering, metrics consistency, and throughput baselines
- Cargo.toml: register scheduler_browser_bench benchmark target

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -260,6 +260,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "load_balancer_benchmark"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "scheduler_browser_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = 3
 lto = "fat"
